item.brick.name: Brick
item.brick.description: Highly durable brick, used in crafting various machines.
item.chromium-bar.name: Chromium Bar
item.chromium-bar.description: A very powerful and strong alloy.
item.chromium-compound.name: Chromium Compound
item.chromium-compound.description: Mixture of Iridium, Quartz and Prismatic powders, ready to be smelted.
item.pulverized-copper.name: Pulverized Copper
item.pulverized-copper.description: Large pile of pure copper, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.
item.pulverized-gold.name: Pulverized Gold
item.pulverized-gold.description: Large pile of pure gold, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.
item.pulverized-iridium.name: Pulverized Iridium
item.pulverized-iridium.description: Large pile of pure iridium, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace, can be fused with a Prismatic Shard.
item.pulverized-iron.name: Pulverized Iron
item.pulverized-iron.description: Large pile of pure iron, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.
item.pulverized-prismatic-shard.name: Pulverized Prismatic Shard
item.pulverized-prismatic-shard.descript: Large pile of pure Prismatic stone, must be combined with Pulverised Iridium & Quartz.
item.pulverized-quartz.name: Pulverized Quartz
item.pulverized-quartz.description: Large pile of pure quartz, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.
item.pulverized-radioactive-metal.name: Pulverized Radioactive Metal
item.pulverized-radioactive-metal.descri: Large pile of pure radioactive material, must be smelted in an Electric Furnace.
item.smelted-fairy-stone.name: Smelted Fairy Stone
item.smelted-fairy-stone.description: Fairy Stone that has been melted down and refined
item.ash.name: Ash
item.depleted-uranium.name: Depleted Uranium
item.depleted-uranium.description: Uranium that cannot be used for a nuclear reaction anymore.
item.heavy-oil.name: Heavy Oil
item.heavy-oil.description: Oil that is high in Sulfur. Takes longer to process.
item.light-oil.name: Light Oil
item.light-oil.description: Oil that is low in Sulfur. Takes less time to process.
item.refined-heavy-oil.name: Refined Heavy Oil
item.refined-heavy-oil.description: Heavy Oil that has been processed for use.
item.refined-light-oil.name: Refined Light Oil
item.refined-light-oil.description: Heavy Oil that has been processed for use.
item.refined-uranium.name: Refined Uranium
item.refined-uranium.description: Uranium that has a higher concentration of the correct isotopes for fission.
item.solid-fuel.name: Solid Fuel
item.solid-fuel.description: Energy dense fuel made by compressing fossil fuels.
item.prismatic-bar.name: Prismatic Bar
item.prismatic-bar.description: A bar of purified prismatic metal.
machine.alternator-e-furnace.name: Alternator E. Furnace
machine.alternator-e-furnace.description: This version of the furnace allows automate control, which smelts only crushed metals.
machine.auto-miner.name: Auto Miner
machine.auto-miner.description: Very powerful miner which can collect metals, takes a full day to complete.
machine.ceramic-kiln.name: Ceramic Kiln
machine.ceramic-kiln.description: Cooks clay into Bricks, which is required by most machines.
machine.chromium-furnace.name: Chromium Furnace
machine.chromium-furnace.description: State of the art industrial grade furnace, smelts at 4x speed AND 2x output.
machine.combustion-generator.name: Combustion Generator
machine.combustion-generator.description: A Generator that converts 3 coal into 1 batt. pack or Solar & Void essence to produce 3 Batt. Packs.
machine.combustion-miner.name: Combustion Miner
machine.combustion-miner.description: A weaker variant to the Auto Miner, takes coal as fuel.
machine.electric-furnace.name: Electric Furnace
machine.electric-furnace.description: Smelts regular and crushed ores at twice the speed, doesn't need coal to operate.
machine.garden-cloche.name: Garden Cloche
machine.garden-cloche.description: An extremely powerful cloche, supply it with 24 of the same seed, and in return, get iridium quality crops (Time varies).
machine.gem-polisher.name: Gem Polisher
machine.gem-polisher.description: An exotic gem polisher, allows upgrading gems to iridium quality.
machine.hay-bin.name: Hay Bin
machine.hay-bin.description: A bin that turns fiber into hay.
machine.hay-rehydrator.name: Hay Rehydrator
machine.hay-rehydrator.description: A bin that turns hay into fiber.
machine.industrial-distillery.name: Industrial Distillery
machine.industrial-distillery.descriptio: Larger more efficent Keg, takes 5 of the same item, and does it at twice the speed, keeps quality and sell value increased.
machine.joja-cola-generator.name: JojaCola Generator
machine.joja-cola-generator.description: Pierre is smart, so smart infact, he invented a machine which uses Joja Cola as a fuel source, by adding 10 cans, you too can make 1 battery, I bet Morris feels envious.
machine.mineral-washer.name: Mineral Washer
machine.mineral-washer.description: Cleans up minerals to improve quality.
machine.preservative-press.name: Preservative Press
machine.preservative-press.description: Larger more efficent perserves jar, takes 5 of the same item, and does it at twice the speed, keeps quality and sell value increased.
machine.pulverizer.name: Pulverizer
machine.pulverizer.description: Crushing 5 ores will net you two pulverized powder, can only be used in Electric Furnaces.
machine.rock-crusher.name: Rock Crusher
machine.rock-crusher.description: Can break down 5 stone for a chance of ore, break down metal bars into pulverized metal, or break higher quality ore into multiple lower quality ores.
machine.super-garden-cloche.name: Super Garden Cloche
machine.super-garden-cloche.description: A powered up version of the garden cloche, supply it with 480 of the same seed, and in return, get iridium quality crops (Time varies).
machine.tree-cloche.name: Tree Cloche
machine.tree-cloche.description: Tree nursery which grows trees faster and produces wood.
machine.battery-charger.name: Battery Charger
machine.battery-charger.description: Takes power from the grid to make batteries.
machine.chemical-processing-machine.name: Chemical Processing Machine
machine.chemical-processing-machine.desc: Refines Coal Into Fuel, Oil into Refined Oil, and Heavy Oil into Solid Fuel.
machine.electric-generator.name: Electric Generator
machine.nuclear-generator.name: Nuclear Generator
machine.nuclear-generator.description: Uses Nuclear Fission with Radioactive Bars or Refined Uranium.
machine.oil-drill.name: Oil Drill
machine.oil-drill.description: Very powerful miner which can collect metals, takes a full day to complete.
machine.solar-generator.name: Solar Generator
machine.solar-generator.description: A unique generator which requires sunlight to operate, doesn't work whiles indoors or at night.
machine.furnace.name: Furnace
config.section.title: Utility Grid Machine Rules
config.section.tooltip: Produced amounts allow {{minProduced}}-{{maxProduced}}. Consumed amounts allow {{minConsumed}}-{{maxConsumed}}. Only resources already used by each machine are shown.
config.machine-toggle.tooltip: Turn this off to exclude this machine from Utility Grid management.
config.resource-produced.name: {{resource}} produced
config.resource-produced.tooltip: Amount of {{resource}} this machine adds to the grid. Type a value from {{min}} to {{max}}.
config.resource-consumed.name: {{resource}} consumed
config.resource-consumed.tooltip: Amount of {{resource}} this machine removes from the grid. Type a value from {{min}} to {{max}}.
